$comment: Codex CLI hooks configuration — Tier 1 base template.
Hook scripts parse multiple common command field shapes (.tool_input.command, .toolInput.command, .command, .input.command).
Project root resolution uses $CODEX_PROJECT_DIR with '.' fallback.
PreCompact is not a Codex event and is intentionally not modeled here.
Non-Bash PreToolUse/PostToolUse are not supported by Codex — all hooks below match Bash tool only where applicable.
